notes: Expected vendor hosts are reporting hints and do not determine capture success.
The model is not forced; record the model from observable client output or captured evidence when available.
The command keeps the read-only filesystem policy and never approval mode while selecting Codex's documented unelevated Windows sandbox fallback; this permits reads but does not grant writes.
CODEX_CA_CERTIFICATE and SSL_CERT_FILE are documented Codex trust-bundle variables. Proxy-variable behavior must be established empirically.
limitations: The Microsoft Store desktop package observed during Phase 3A exposes no standalone CLI execution alias.
A runnable standalone codex command is required for live integration tests.
No credential, token, cookie, session identifier, account email, or organization identifier is stored here.
